gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially requested release-evidence alignment for padded strides and stricter KVModelProfile.bytes_per_token stride validation; both were fixed and the second review returned APPROVED with no blocking findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine.py tests/test_model_profiles.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_release_evidence.py -q -> 256 passed
what_changed: Allowed KVLayout and KVModelProfile byte math to use padded kv_stride_bytes while preserving default Qwen3 layout behavior.
Updated release evidence validation to accept padded Qwen3 V1 probe/action layouts when geometry, storage layout, and byte totals are consistent.
why: Engine backends can pad or align KV-head storage; the public layout schema already exposed kv_stride_bytes, so bytes-per-token and release gates should honor valid padded strides instead of forcing an unpadded head payload.
